nodes.name: Call AI API
nodes.notes: ANTHROPIC (active). For OpenAI: change url to https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions, replace x-api-key header with Authorization: Bearer $env.OPENAI_API_KEY, and use model gpt-4o-mini with system+user messages.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.system_prompt + '\n\n' + $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

parameters.subject: =🚨 ShipWatch {{ $json.priority }}: {{ $json.issue_title }}
parameters.html:
=

🚨 {{ $json.priority }} Issue Escalation

Issue#{{ $json.issue_number }}: {{ $json.issue_title }}
Author{{ $json.issue_author }}
Classification{{ $json.classification }}
Priority{{ $json.priority }}
Routed to{{ $json.route_channel }}
Reasoning{{ $json.reasoning }}

View Issue on GitHub →

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ github_issue_number: $json.issue_number, github_repo: $json.repo_full_name, issue_title: $json.issue_title, issue_author: $json.issue_author, classification: $json.classification, priority: $json.priority, routed_to: $json.route_channel, labels_applied: $json.labels_to_apply, raw_ai_response: $json.raw_ai_response }) }}
